task_objective: Fix Ludusavi Flatpak discovery when Decky's backend cannot see the user's Flatpak installation.
tests_added: tests/test_ludusavi.py SDH adapter passes Decky user home into pyludusavi
tests/test_ludusavi.py rclone probe reuses pyludusavi command prefix
design_decisions: Keep Ludusavi discovery in pyludusavi and extend it with an optional flatpak_user_home argument.
Prefer flatpak run --user with Decky's user home environment before falling back to default/system Flatpak candidates.
Use pyludusavi's discovered command prefix for rclone probing so Ludusavi and rclone run through the same Flatpak installation.
results: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_ludusavi_discovery.py tests/test_ludusavi.py passed
./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/ passed
./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 62 tests
./run.sh uv run python scripts/package_plugin.py rebuilt out/SDH-ludusavi.zip
